query:
CREATE TABLE analyses (
  id CHAR(36) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  lead_id CHAR(36) NULL,
  temp_session_id VARCHAR(64) NULL,
  file_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  file_name VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  mime_type VARCHAR(64) NULL,
  status ENUM('temp','persisted_email_verified','full_unlocked','failed','purged') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'temp',
  error_code VARCHAR(64) NULL,
  full_json JSON NULL,
  preview_score INT NULL,
  preview_grade VARCHAR(4) NULL,
  preview_findings JSON NULL,
  pillar_statuses JSON NULL,
  fb_submit_application_sent BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE email_verifications (
  id CHAR(36) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  lead_id CHAR(36) NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  token_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  temp_attach_token VARCHAR(64) NULL,
  expires_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  consumed_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE lead_sessions (
  id CHAR(36) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  lead_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  session_token_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  expires_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  last_seen_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  is_revoked BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE lead_events (
  id CHAR(36) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  lead_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  analysis_id CHAR(36) NULL,
  event_name VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  event_id VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  source ENUM('web','server','webhook','system') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'server',
  payload JSON NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE lead_calls (
  id CHAR(36) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  lead_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  provider VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'phonecall.bot',
  external_call_id VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  call_type ENUM('quote_upload','no_quote','followup') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('queued','ringing','completed','no_answer','voicemail','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued',
  outcome ENUM('booked','callback_requested','interested','not_interested','wrong_number','do_not_call') NULL,
  sentiment ENUM('positive','neutral','negative') NULL,
  transferred BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  transfer_target_id TEXT NULL,
  transfer_note TEXT NULL,
  callback_confirmed_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  callback_window VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  disposition VARCHAR(64) NULL,
  duration_seconds INT NULL,
  recording_url TEXT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  last_event_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
